mapper.select: SELECT e.exam_id, e.exam_name, e.paper_id, e.class_id, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.status, e.allow_screen_switch, e.create_by, e.create_time, p.paper_name, p.duration, c.class_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = e.class_id) as student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = e.exam_id AND status = 2) as submitted_count FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper p ON e.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id WHERE e.exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT e.exam_id, e.exam_name, e.paper_id, e.class_id, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.status, e.allow_screen_switch, e.create_by, e.create_time, p.paper_name, p.duration, c.class_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = e.class_id) as student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = e.exam_id AND status = 2) as submitted_count FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper p ON e.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.exam_id, e.exam_name, e.paper_id, e.class_id, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.status, e.allow_screen_switch, e.create_by, e.create_time, p.paper_name, p.duration, c.class_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = e.class_id) as student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = e.exam_id AND status = 2) as submitted_count FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper p ON e.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id WHERE e.create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.exam_id, e.exam_name, e.paper_id, e.class_id, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.status, e.allow_screen_switch, e.create_by, e.create_time, p.paper_name, p.duration, c.class_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = e.class_id) as student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = e.exam_id AND status = 2) as submitted_count FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper p ON e.paper_id = p.paper_id LEFT JOIN class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id WHERE e.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (exam_name, paper_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, status, allow_screen_switch, create_by) VALUES (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{classId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{allowScreenSwitch}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET exam_name = #{examName}, paper_id = #{paperId}, class_id = #{classId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, allow_screen_switch = #{allowScreenSwitch} WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam WHERE status = #{status}
